patient_summary:
• 73/F patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus
• Key Procedures: Colonoscopy with biopsy
• Active Meds: 1 medication including Atorvastatin
• Critical Labs: Ferritin 266.8 ng/mL (High); Iron 41 ug/dL (Low); eGFR 58 ml/min/1.73m2 (Low)
• Key History: MRSA (09/03/2020); COVID-19 recovered 01/04/2021
